title: Improving oral cavity cancer diagnosis and treatment with fluorescence molecular imaging.
author: Vonk J de Wit JG Voskuil FJ Witjes MJH
content: S-EPMC7818506 PMC7818506 Improving oral cavity cancer diagnosis and treatment with fluorescence molecular imaging.
